headline: J&J Stock Trading Above 200- & 50-Day SMA for 8 Months: Time to Buy?
summary: JNJ stock holds strong above key SMAs for 8 months as Innovative Medicine strength, new drugs and MedTech gains fuel momentum despite patent and legal risks.
